violations.text: Wood is used in the construction of table legs under service and 3 bay sink areas. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the three bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023
